title: AI Pop Art
description: Transforms a photo into a bold mid-century pop-art screen print.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a bold mid-century pop-art screen print. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, key facial features, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, outfit shapes, and scene context. Use a limited palette of vivid primary and secondary colors, thick graphic contours, flat color blocks, high contrast, Ben-Day halftone dots, offset screen-print registration, and energetic poster-like composition. Keep faces recognizable and visually clean. Do not add text. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, trademarks, watermarks, signatures, speech bubbles, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted face, asymmetrical eyes, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, photorealism, muddy colors, gradients, glossy 3D render, low contrast, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. cyan, magenta and yellow palette, stronger halftone dots...
